title: Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park
tagline: Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park — wildlife reserve of Telangana

heroImage.alt: Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park, Telangana

overview.short: Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park is a deer national park located in Vanasthalipuram, Hyderabad, Telangana, India.
overview.description: Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park is a deer national park located in Vanasthalipuram, Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is spread over 3605 acres. It is the largest green lung space in the city of Hyderabad.

topPlaces.name: Hayat Bakshi Mosque, Hayathnagar
topPlaces.description: The Hayat Bakshi Mosque also Hayat Bakshi Begum Masjid is a mosque located in Hayathnagar, near Hyderabad, in the Hyderabad district of the state of Telangana, India. It was constructed in 1672 during the reign of Abdullah Qutb Shah the fifth Sultan of Golconda, and named after Hayat Bakshi Begum.

topPlaces.name: Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services
topPlaces.description: Indian National Center for Ocean Information Services (INCOIS) is an autonomous organization of the Government of India, under the Ministry of Earth Sciences, located in Pragathi Nagar, Hyderabad. ESSO-INCOIS was established as an autonomous body in 1998 under the Ministry of Earth Sciences (MoES) and is a unit of the Earth System Science Organization (ESSO).

image.alt: Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services

topPlaces.name: Gaddi Annaram
topPlaces.description: Gaddi Annaram is a Municipality in Ranga Reddy district located in the city of Hyderabad in the state of Telangana in India.

topPlaces.name: LB Nagar metro station
topPlaces.description: LB Nagar (also known as Vasavi LB Nagar) is a metro station located on the Red Line of the Hyderabad Metro. It is part of Corridor I of Hyderabad metro starting from Miyapur and was opened to public on 24 September 2018.

topPlaces.name: Chintalakunta
topPlaces.description: Chintalakunta is a residential neighbourhood in L. B. Nagar suburb of Hyderabad, Telangana, India. In the 1980s it was a sleepy village on the outskirts of Hyderadbad.

topPlaces.name: Victoria Memorial metro station
topPlaces.description: The Victoria Memorial Metro Station is located on the Red Line of the Hyderabad Metro, India. It is part of Corridor I of Hyderabad metro starting from Miyapur and was opened to public on 24 September 2018.

topPlaces.name: Gandhi Bhavan metro station
topPlaces.description: The Gandhi Bhavan Metro Station is located on the Red Line of the Hyderabad Metro, in the city of Hyderabad, Telangana, India. It is near to Care Hospital, Ram Ki Bandi, Hotel Shadab and Numaish Exhibition Grounds.

topPlaces.name: Champapet
topPlaces.description: Champapet is a residential and commercial suburb of Hyderabad, India. It is known for its many function halls.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (20 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (11 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park?
faq.a: Stays in Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mahavir Harina Vanasthali National Park?
faq.a: The top attractions are Hayat Bakshi Mosque, Hayathnagar, Indian National Centre for Ocean Information Services, Gaddi Annaram, LB Nagar metro station, Chintalakunta.
